name: Honey Almond Butter-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, blend together the honey and almond paste using an electric mixer.
2. Beat in the butter until creamy.
3. Serve with Honey Apricot Muffins or toasted English muffins.
[Makes about 1 cup. Nutrients Per Serving (2 Tbsp.): Calories: 178 Sodium: 60.8 mg Carbohydrates: 23.6 g Protein: 1.82 g Cholesterol: 15.5 mg Dietary Fiber: 2.14 g Total Fat: 9.6 g Cal. from Fat: 46%]
